message:
🌱 Add cortex: Unshipped blocks when out of order writes are enabled mission (#1325)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cortex-5402-unshipped-blocks-when-out-of-order-writes-are-enabled",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cortex: Unshipped blocks when out of order writes are enabled",
+    "description": "Unshipped blocks when out of order writes are enabled. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cortex troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cortex deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex -n cortex --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cortex configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cortex configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl get configmap -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cortex\n```\nUnshipped blocks are shown in the `cortex_ingester_oldest_unshipped_block_timestamp_seconds` metric and are also visible in the ingester storage when out of order writes are enabled with the configuration introduced in #4964."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unshipped blocks when out of order writes are enabled",
+        "description": "If OOO is enabled, shipper needs to upload compacted blocks.\nAnother thing is that we supports hot reload of OOO time window so we might need to support hot reload shipper configuration as well.\n```yaml\nout_of_order_time_window: 30m\nout_of_order_cap_max: 32\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unshipped blocks when out of order writes are… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex -n cortex --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cortex --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "If OOO is enabled, shipper needs to upload compacted blocks.\nAnother thing is that we supports hot reload of OOO time window so we might need to support hot reload shipper configuration as well.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "out_of_order_time_window: 30m\nout_of_order_cap_max: 32",
+        "out_of_order_time_window: 30m\nout_of_order_cap_max: 32\nskip_blocks_with_out_of_order_chunks_enabled: true",
+        "caller=compact.go:698 org_id=fake msg=\"Found overlapping blocks during compaction\" ulid=01H2SSZF807FMM2FD52HFGA3N7"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cortex",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cortex"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cortexproject/cortex/issues/5402",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cortexproject/cortex",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cortexproject/cortex/pull/5416"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cortex installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:28:25.408Z",

+  }
+}
